products.name: Gold Jhumka
products.description: Exquisite traditional gold-plated jhumkas featuring intricate filigree work and delicate pearl hangings. Handmade by skilled artisans.

products.name: Pearl Earrings
products.description: Stunning teardrop earrings decorated with high-luster freshwater pearls and sparkling cubic zirconia accent stones.

products.name: Diamond Studs
products.description: Brilliant round-cut diamond studs set in a classic four-prong 18k white gold setting. The ultimate statement of luxury.

products.name: Ruby Danglers
products.description: Glamorous drop earrings featuring deep red synthetic ruby centerstones surrounded by crystal micro-pave accents.

products.name: Emerald Drops
products.description: Stunning drop earrings highlighting cushion-cut lab-created emeralds in a vintage gold border. Radiates majestic beauty.

products.name: Silver Hoops
products.description: Polished sterling silver hoop earrings with a secure clasp mechanism. Versatile design suitable for daily wear.

products.name: Kundan Jhumka
products.description: Authentic Kundan earrings featuring traditional foil-set gemstones, green glass beads, and meenakari paint detailing on the reverse.

products.name: Antique Chandbali
products.description: Moon-shaped antique chandbali earrings finished in oxidized metal tones, showcasing tribal carvings and cascading silver bells.

products.name: Meenakari Earrings
products.description: Brightly enameled meenakari drop earrings with floral motifs, pink enamel colors, and tiny white seed pearl fringes.

products.name: Crystal Danglers
products.description: Chic long dangle earrings constructed with high-quality multi-faceted glass crystals that capture and reflect light beautifully.
